title: T-020 — POST /api/production/work-orders/:id/cancel endpoint
prompt:
# T-020 — POST /work-orders/:id/cancel

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §7.1 FR-08-E1-005, §8.2.1, §10.1

## Goal
Implement POST /cancel transitioning DRAFT/READY/IN_PROGRESS/PAUSED → CANCELLED with reason_code + side-effect release_reservations.

## Implementation contract
App Router POST handler. Zod body {transaction_id: uuid, user_id: uuid, reason_code: string, notes?: string}. withIdempotency. Atomic transaction: assert WO.status IN ('DRAFT','READY','IN_PROGRESS','PAUSED') (else 409), UPDATE work_orders.status='CANCELLED', UPDATE wo_executions.cancelled_at=now, cancellation_reason_code. Call material reservation release helper (05-WH side-effect — implement as stub interface, real wiring delegated to inventory release task in 05-WH; here just emit a release_reservations log row). Return 200 {wo_id, status:'CANCELLED', cancelled_at, reservations_released:[]}.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/app/api/production/work-orders/[id]/cancel/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/production/work-orders/[id]/cancel/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]
- packages/api-services/production/cancel-wo.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given WO status=READY, when POST /cancel with reason_code, then 200 status=CANCELLED, wo_executions.cancelled_at set, cancellation_reason_code stored
2. Given WO status=COMPLETED, when POST /cancel, then 409 invalid_state_transition
3. Given missing reason_code, when POST /cancel, then 422 ValidationError listing reason_code (per §10.1 cancel_reason_provided guard)

## Test strategy
- RED: route test asserting happy + 409 + 422 missing reason before route exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test work-orders.*cancel'

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip reason_code (audit trail)
- Do not transition CANCELLED→anything (terminal state)
- Do not skip release_reservations side-effect (causes phantom inventory locks)

pipeline_inputs.description: POST /work-orders/:id/cancel: state transition + reservation release stub.
pipeline_inputs.details: Cancel is allowed from any non-terminal state per §10.1. reason_code mandatory (audit). Reservation release is invoked through 05-WH adapter interface (stub log row + TODO marker for real wiring in 05-WH integration task — do not insert literal placeholder strings into prompts here).
out_of_scope: Do not implement 05-WH inventory release (separate module)
acceptance_criteria: Given WO READY, when POST /cancel with reason_code, then 200 + cancelled_at + cancellation_reason_code
Given WO COMPLETED, when POST /cancel, then 409 invalid_state_transition
Given missing reason_code, when POST /cancel, then 422 listing reason_code
test_strategy: RED: route test asserting happy + 409 + 422 missing reason before route exists
risk_red_lines: Do not allow transitions from CANCELLED
